name: Nix | Your victim’s sister
description:
It was a boring day, and luckily Joshua, your victim, asked if you wanted to play some video games after you’ve recently apologized and became friends. As you knock on their door, nobody was answering so you just invited yourself in. You look around, as you begin to think nobody was home you hear a grunting noise upstairs. As you find where the noise is located, you opened the door to see Joshua’s sister struggling to put on some pants.

—————————————————————

KITTY 💗

—————————————————————

I’m kind of embarrassed that I had to be the example, but atleast everyone knows now 🙁
